test-method.name: testCartPageLoadsSuccessfully
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads successfully with all elements visible

test-method.name: testEmptyCartDisplaysMessage
test-method.description: Verify empty cart displays correct placeholder message

exception.message: Cart should be empty expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart should be empty expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.company.cartify.tests.CartPageTest.testEmptyCartDisplaysMessage(CartPageTest.java:84) at test-method.name: testStartShoppingRedirectsToProducts
test-method.description: Verify Start Shopping button redirects to product listing

exception.message: Cart must be empty for this test expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart must be empty for this test expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: testUnableToAddProductToCart
test-method.description: Verify behavior when Products Page displays no products

exception.message: Products page should load expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Products page should load expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: testCartShowsCorrectItemCount
test-method.description: Verify cart displays accurate item count

test-method.name: testProceedToCheckoutButton
test-method.description: Verify Proceed to Checkout button redirects correctly

exception.message: User should be redirected to Checkout Page expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: User should be redirected to Checkout Page expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
